label: Estranged marriage
description: Evelyn and Simon maintained a polished public partnership while privately negotiating separation.

label: Fractured father and son
description: Jonah blamed Simon for using family pressure to protect the institute's reputation.

label: Secret affair
description: Daniel and Simon concealed an intimate relationship that could damage both careers.

label: Succession rivalry
description: Lena expected to become director if Simon lost board confidence.

label: Ethics dispute
description: Marcus accused Simon of burying adverse research outcomes.

label: Former patient activist
description: Mira publicly accused Simon of using patient stories without consent.

label: Donor leverage
description: Ezra threatened to pull funding unless Simon protected a naming deal.

label: Operations pressure
description: Clara ran much of the gala machinery while Simon received public credit.

label: Dependent brother
description: Martin's care facility relied on payments Clara kept private.

label: Route coordination
description: Maryam depended on Clara for last-minute movement plans during the gala.

label: Exhibit handoff
description: Noah's toolkit and the Memory Arch passed through operations control after inspection.

label: Payment audit
description: Priya alerted Simon to duplicate vendor payments on gala accounts.

label: Accessibility work
description: Keisha and Clara designed practical accessibility changes later presented under Simon's name.

label: Incidental photograph
description: Tessa's gala photos captured corridor details neither woman expected to matter.
